title: alnus ovata f. repens
intro: Alnus ovata f. repens, also known as the spreading alder, is a shrub-like or tree-like form of Alnus ovata, a species of tree in the family Betulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Alnus ovata f. repens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Alnus ovata f. repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
